item.title: 300 台机器人跑半马，冠军成绩打破人类纪录，「豆包」也来凑热闹
item.guid: 300-台机器人跑半马，冠军成绩打破人类纪录，「豆包」也来凑热闹
item.description:
Yesterday, the 2026 Beijing Yizhuang Humanoid Robot Half Marathon officially concluded. This year's event attracted over 300 humanoid robots and 26 mainstream brands, with the participating lineup growing nearly 5 times compared to last year. Honor's "Lightning" robots swept the top three places: 昨天，2026 北京亦庄人形机器人半程马拉松正式落幕。本届赛事吸引了 300 余台人形机器人、26 个主流品牌参赛，参赛阵容较去年实现近 5 倍增长。荣耀「闪电」机器人包揽前三名：

    🥇 Champion: Monkey King Team, net time 50 minutes 26 seconds;

    🥈 Runner-up: Thunder Lightning Team, net time 50 minutes 56 seconds;

    🥉 Third Place: Spark Spreading Team, net time 53 minutes 01 second.

All top three finished within 53 minutes, not only significantly surpassing last year's champion TianGong Ultra's 2 hours 40 minutes, but also comprehensively breaking the human half-marathon world record (56 minutes 42 seconds). 前三名全部跑进 53 分钟，不仅大幅超越去年冠军天工 Ultra 的 2 小时 40 分，也全面刷新了人类半马世界纪录（56 分 42 秒）。

The track difficulty significantly increased compared to last year. The full 21.0975 kilometers course for the first time introduced an ecological section of Nanhai Wetland Park, integrating over 10 types of terrain including flat ground, slopes, curves, and narrow sections, comprising 22 turns and multiple sharp turns approaching 90°, posing a strong challenge to robots' dynamic balance and path planning. 赛道难度相较去年显著提升。全程 21.0975 公里，首次引入南海子公园生态路段，融合平地、坡道、弯道、狭窄路段等 10 余种地形，包含 22 个弯道及多处接近 90° 的急转，对机器人的动态平衡与路径规划构成较强挑战。

Regarding race rules, participating teams are divided into autonomous navigation group (performance coefficient 1.0) and remote control group (performance coefficient 1.2), with the proportion of autonomous navigation teams having jumped to 38%. 赛事规则方面，参赛队伍分为自主导航组（成绩系数 1.0）与遥控组（成绩系数 1.2），自主导航参赛队伍占比已跃升至 38%。

There were also interesting scenes on the track. Some robots suddenly braked while running, others "staged a fender bender" by sticking to the roadside fence; some robots fell to the ground just before crossing the finish line, then shakily got up with engineer assistance to complete the crossing; another one, after crossing the finish line, continued straight into the nearby green belt. 赛场上亦不乏趣味画面。有机器人跑着跑着突然刹停，有机器人贴上路边围栏完成「碰瓷表演」；有机器人在冲线前一刻栽倒在地，在工程师协助下颤颤巍巍爬起完成撞线；还有一台冲过终点后一鼓作气冲进了旁边的绿化带。

A "Doubao" humanoid robot, self-made by a Douyin blogger, also became a focal point on the track — with its round head, iconic smiling face, and short, shuffling steps, it even performed stretching exercises before the race. Related videos quickly went viral on social media. This robot belonged to the remote control group and was operated by the blogger from inside a follow car. 一名抖音博主自制的「豆包」人形机器人同样成为赛场焦点——圆脑袋、标志性笑脸、短腿小碎步，赛前还做了拉伸动作，相关视频在社交媒体上迅速走红。该机器人属遥控操作组，由博主在跟随车内进行操控。

🔗 Related Reading: The Cutest Last Place Ever, 2026 Robot Half Marathon Abstract Awards 🔗 相关阅读： 史上最萌垫底，2026机器人半马抽象大赏

item.title: 受内存影响，新 MacBook 发布或延期
item.guid: 受内存影响，新-MacBook-发布或延期
item.description:
According to the latest report from Bloomberg, Apple's planned new Mac Studio and touchscreen MacBook Pro models are facing launch delays due to industry-wide memory supply shortages. 据彭博社最新报道，受全行业内存供应短缺影响，苹果原计划推出的新款 Mac Studio 与触屏版 MacBook Pro 面临发售延期。

The report revealed that Apple had originally planned to release a new Mac Studio equipped with a new high-end chip in the middle of this year, as the successor to the previous M4 Max and M3 Ultra models. 据报道透露，苹果原定于今年年中发布搭载新型高端芯片的 Mac Studio，作为前代 M4 Max 及 M3 Ultra 机型的继任者。

However, due to ongoing tightness in the high-spec memory supply chain, the shipping period for some high-memory Mac products currently on sale has been extended by several months. Internal assessments suggest that the actual shipping time for the new Mac Studio will likely be postponed until around October this year. 然而，因高规格内存供应链持续紧张，当前部分在售的高内存 Mac 产品的发货周期已被拉长数月，内部评估认为新款 Mac Studio 的实际出货时间大概率将推迟至今年 10 月前后。

At the same time, the launch schedule for the touchscreen MacBook Pro, originally planned for late 2026 to early 2027, has also been affected. #NewMacBookDelay# 同时，原计划于 2026 年底至 2027 年初问世的触屏版 MacBook Pro 发售节奏亦受波及。#新MacBook延期#

This product series features a lightweight and thin design, with the screen introducing a punch-hole "Dynamic Island" camera module and planning to be equipped with an M6 chip. Although the accompanying software system will be ready for development this autumn, due to physical supply chain shortages, its final market launch will fall to the latest period of the planned time window. 该系列产品主打轻薄化设计，屏幕将引入打孔式「灵动岛」摄像头模块，并计划搭载 M6 芯片。尽管配套软件系统将在今年秋季开发就绪，但受制于物理供应链短缺，其最终上市时间将滑落至规划时间窗口的最晚期。

item.title: 微信朋友圈迎 14 周年，官方分享内部细节
item.guid: 微信朋友圈迎-14-周年，官方分享内部细节
item.description:
Yesterday marked the 14th anniversary of WeChat Moments' launch. WeChat's official account "WeChat Pai" published an article sharing early stories and internal details behind the birth of Moments. 昨天是微信朋友圈上线 14 周年，微信官方公众号「微信派」发文，分享了朋友圈诞生背后的一批早期故事与内部细节。

On April 19, 2012, WeChat version 4.0 passed App Store review and officially launched, and the Moments feature was introduced to users. Regarding this date, the team frankly stated there was no special meaning, "it was just the day the App Store approved our new version." 2012 年 4 月 19 日，微信 4.0 版本通过 App Store 审核并正式上线，朋友圈功能随之与用户见面。对于这一日期，团队坦言并无特殊寓意，「只不过是那天 App Store 通过了我们新版本的审核」。

Before its official launch, the internal team went through a total of 34 test versions, exhausting all 26 English letters for version numbers and having to switch to other symbols for continued labeling. 而在正式上线之前，团队内部共经历了 34 个测试版本，版本号将 26 个英文字母全部用尽，不得不改用其他符号继续标注。

WeChat officials also shared several design trade-offs made for Moments. 微信官方还分享了朋友圈在产品设计上的几处取舍。

The "Like" and "Comment" functions were deliberately hidden behind buttons rather than directly exposed, to ensure that the content itself remains central in the Timeline. Moments still has no filter function because "real life shouldn't have filters."

The plain text posting feature was initially just an internal test easter egg. The team believed that posting text required thought and editing, a much higher barrier than posting photos or videos, so it was not initially opened as an official feature. Today, this "internal test easter egg" has become a default user operation. 纯文字发布功能早期仅是一个内部测试用的彩蛋。团队认为，发文字需要经过思考和编辑，门槛远高于发照片或视频，因此最初并未将其作为正式功能对外开放。如今，这一「内测彩蛋」已成为用户的默认操作。

item.title: 蔚来官方回应 ES9 仍采用隐藏式门把手：目前完全合规
item.guid: 蔚来官方回应-ES9-仍采用隐藏式门把手：目前完全合规
item.description:
Recently, Nio issued a statement responding to external doubts about the compliance of the hidden door handles on its ES9 model, clearly stating that all Nio models currently on sale can normally use hidden door handles and are fully compliant. 日前，蔚来发文回应外界对旗下 ES9 车型隐藏式门把手的合规性质疑，明确表示目前蔚来全系在售车型均可正常使用隐藏式门把手，且完全合规。

Nio stated that the mandatory national standard "Safety Technical Requirements for Automobile Door Handles," officially released on February 2 this year, includes a clause prohibiting hidden handles, which stipulates that new models announced before December 31, 2027, and current/facelift models manufactured before December 31, 2028, may continue to use hidden handles. 蔚来表示，今年 2 月 2 日正式发布的强制性国家标准《汽车车门把手安全技术要求》，其中，禁止隐藏式把手的条款要求：2027 年 12 月 31 日前上公告的全新车型，以及 2028 年 12 月 31 日前出厂的现款/改款车型，均可继续使用隐藏式把手。

Regarding safety mechanisms, Nio officially claims that the ES9 is equipped with multiple redundant designs: 在安全机制方面，蔚来官方宣称 ES9 配备了多重冗余设计：

    The vehicle will automatically unlock immediately after detecting a collision signal. Even if the door handle fails to pop out automatically, the door can still be opened mechanically by pressing the front or rear end of the handle, facilitating rescue by external personnel;

    Each door inside the car is equipped with an emergency mechanical pull handle at the map pocket, along with fluorescent reminder stickers to ensure visibility at night. The child lock will also automatically unlock after a collision;

    In terms of power supply, the ES9 adopts a dual low-voltage battery redundant power supply and a dual-channel communication architecture, ensuring that the door lock system can still operate normally even in extreme cases of single-channel power failure.

item.title: 内存短缺或延续至 2027 年，三大厂商产能仅能满足六成需求
item.guid: 内存短缺或延续至-2027-年，三大厂商产能仅能满足六成需求
item.description:
According to Nikkei Asia, the global memory chip shortage is expected to last until around 2027. Samsung Electronics, SK Hynix, and Micron Technology's DRAM capacity expansion can only meet about 60% of the market demand by then, while these three companies collectively account for approximately 90% of the global DRAM market share. 据《日经亚洲》报道，全球内存芯片短缺预计将持续至 2027 年前后，三星电子、海力士与美光科技的 DRAM 产能扩张速度仅能满足届时市场需求的约 60%，而三家企业合计占据全球 DRAM 市场约 90% 的份额。

In recent years, they have concentrated resources on producing High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) required for AI data centers, leading to sustained pressure on the supply of general-purpose memory. The shortage has gradually become apparent since last autumn, with memory prices rising by approximately 90% quarter-on-quarter in the first quarter of this year. 近年来，它们将资源集中投入 AI 数据中心所需的高带宽内存（HBM）生产，导致通用型内存供给持续受压，短缺态势自去年秋季起已逐步显现，今年第一季度内存价格环比涨幅约达 90%。

In terms of capacity, most of the new production lines from the three manufacturers will not be operational until next year or even after 2028. SK Hynix's HBM wafer fab, which started in Cheongju in February this year, is the only substantial capacity increase among the three this year. 产能方面，三家厂商的新增产线大多要到明年乃至 2028 年后才能投产。海力士今年 2 月在清州启动的 HBM 晶圆厂，是三家中今年唯一实质性的产能增量。

SK Group Chairman Chey Tae-won stated in mid-March this year that the tight supply of AI memory might even extend until 2030. Counterpoint Research estimates that resolving the shortage requires the industry to expand capacity by 12% annually, but current plans from all parties can only achieve 7.5%, meaning that the supply-demand relationship is not expected to normalize until 2028 at the earliest . SK 集团会长崔泰源今年 3 月中旬表示，AI 内存供给紧张甚至可能延续至 2030 年。Counterpoint Research 估算，化解短缺需行业每年扩产 12%，而目前各方规划仅能实现 7.5%， 供需关系最快要到 2028 年才有望正常化 。

The impact of the shortage is spreading to consumer electronics. The proportion of memory costs in the manufacturing cost of low-priced smartphones is expected to rise from about 20% currently to nearly 40% by mid-year. Products such as mobile phones, laptops, and VR headsets have all seen varying degrees of price increases. IDC data shows that smartphone sales are expected to decline by 13% year-on-year this year. 短缺冲击正向消费电子蔓延。内存成本占低价智能手机制造成本的比例，预计将从当前约 20% 升至今年年中的近 40%，手机、笔记本电脑、VR 头显等产品均已出现不同程度的涨价。IDC 数据显示，今年智能手机销量预计同比下滑 13%。

item.title: Panic：AI 写的文案、画的图、作的曲，Playdate 一律不收
item.guid: Panic：AI-写的文案、画的图、作的曲，Playdate-一律不收
item.description:
Recently, Panic announced that its Playdate game store, Catalog, will no longer accept games that use generative AI for art, audio, music, text, or dialogue content. The Season 3 game collection also completely prohibits works developed using generative AI in any form. 日前，Panic 宣布，旗下 Playdate 游戏商店 Catalog 将不再接受使用生成式 AI 制作美术、音频、音乐、文字或对话内容的游戏作品，第三季游戏合集亦全面禁止以任何形式使用生成式 AI 开发的作品。

According to the official AI usage statement, the ban covers large language models such as ChatGPT, DeepSeek, and Google Gemini; image generation models like Stable Diffusion, DALL-E, and Midjourney; and audio generation models such as MuseNet, Suno, and Udio; 根据官方 AI 使用声明，禁令涵盖 ChatGPT、DeepSeek、Google Gemini 等大语言模型，Stable Diffusion、DALL-E、Midjourney 等图像生成模型，以及 MuseNet、Suno、Udio 等音频生成模型；

However, works that use AI-assisted tools in the programming phase are temporarily exempt. The platform will label such works and specify the extent of AI use, allowing players to decide whether to support them. 但编程环节使用 AI 辅助工具的作品暂获豁免，平台将对此类作品进行标注并注明具体使用程度，以便玩家自主决定是否支持。

This policy adjustment stems from the controversy surrounding the simulation racing game "Wheelsprung" in June last year—the game was found to have used GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT for assisted development after being selected for the Season 2 collection. 此次政策调整源于去年 6 月模拟赛车游戏《Wheelsprung》的争议——该游戏入选第二季合集后被发现使用了 GitHub Copilot 与 ChatGPT 辅助开发。

Panic co-founder Cabel Sasser admitted in an interview with "Exp.": "We completely did not anticipate developers using large language models at the time. In retrospect, it was too naive, and we take full responsibility for it." Panic 联合创始人 Cabel Sasser 在接受《Exp.》采访时坦承：「我们当时完全没有预料到开发者会使用大语言模型，回头来看过于天真，我们对此承担全部责任。」

item.title: 张雪机车「冠军同款」最长等到 11 月，二手炒价已达 10 万
item.guid: 张雪机车「冠军同款」最长等到-11-月，二手炒价已达-10-万
item.description:
According to multiple media reports, after Zhangxue Motorcycle won two consecutive rounds at the WSBK Portugal station in March this year, domestic orders immediately saw explosive growth, and brand popularity continued to soar. 据多家媒体报道，今年 3 月张雪机车在 WSBK 葡萄牙站连夺两回合冠军后，国内订单随即爆发式增长，品牌热度持续高涨。

Official prices remain unchanged: the ZX500RR starts at 29,980 yuan, the ZX820RR is 43,800 yuan, and the 820RR-R version is expected to launch in June this year at 61,980 yuan, but the delivery period has been significantly extended. 官方售价维持不变：ZX500RR 售价 29980 元起，ZX820RR 售价 43800 元，820RR-R 版预计今年 6 月上市，售价 61980 元，交付周期却已大幅拉长。

A Zhangxue Motorcycle staff member stated at the Hainan Expo on April 13, "If you order an 820RR now, you might have to wait until October or November." On the Xianyu platform, the transfer price for orders has been speculated up to 100,000 yuan; an auction for a replica of the championship-winning race bike, which started on April 10 with a reserve price of 400,000 yuan, soared to its 5 million yuan cap in just 45 seconds. 张雪机车工作人员在 4 月 13 日消博会现场表示，「如果你现在定 820RR 的话，可能要等到 10 月或 11 月。」闲鱼平台上订单转让价格最高已被炒至 10 万元；4 月 10 日开启的夺冠赛车复刻版拍卖，起拍价 40 万元仅用 45 秒便飙至 500 万元封顶。

Regarding overseas expansion, Huang Qin, head of Zhangxue Motorcycle's foreign trade department, revealed at the 139th Canton Fair on April 17 that overseas orders have exceeded 1,000 units. The first batch of products destined for Europe is expected to be shipped in June this year, with prices in Europe 40% to 50% lower than comparable brands. The annual overseas sales target is set at 5,000 units. 出海方面，张雪机车外贸部部长黄秦于 4 月 17 日在第 139 届广交会上透露，海外订单已超 1000 台，首批销往欧洲的产品预计今年 6 月发运，在欧洲的报价较同类品牌低 40% 至 50%，全年海外销量目标定为 5000 台。

On the track, in the first round of the WorldSSP category at the WSBK Dutch station held on April 18, Zhang Xue Motorcycle's No. 53 rider Debise secured fourth place. Zhang Xue himself admitted in an interview with Hunan Satellite TV that traffic has become a 'sweet burden,' and he claimed to be a 'billionaire in debt' due to owing the company 30 million yuan. 赛场上，4 月 18 日进行的 WSBK 荷兰站 WorldSSP 组别第一回合正赛中，张雪机车 53 号车手德比斯获得第四名。张雪本人接受湖南卫视采访时坦言，流量已成为「甜蜜的负担」，并自称因欠公司 3000 万元是「亿万负翁」。

item.title: Meta 将裁员 8000 人
item.guid: Meta-将裁员-8000-人
item.description:
According to Reuters, Meta plans to initiate its first round of large-scale layoffs this year on May 20, affecting approximately 10% of its global workforce, or nearly 8,000 people. 据路透社报道，Meta 计划于 5 月 20 日启动今年首轮大规模裁员，涉及约 10% 的全球员工，即接近 8000 人。

Three informed sources revealed that the company will also implement a second round of layoffs in the second half of this year, but the specific timing and scale have not yet been determined. Executives stated that plans will be adjusted as appropriate based on the development dynamics of AI capabilities. 三位知情人士透露，公司还将在今年下半年实施第二轮裁员，但具体时间与规模尚未确定。高管们表示，将根据 AI 能力的发展动态适时调整计划。

The report pointed out that these layoffs are Meta's largest staff reduction since its 'Year of Efficiency' from 2022 to 2023. 报道指出，此次裁员是 Meta 自 2022 年至 2023 年「效率之年」以来规模最大的一次人员削减。

item.title: 曝 Cursor 将融资 20 亿美元
item.guid: 曝-Cursor-将融资-20-亿美元
item.description:
According to TechCrunch, AI programming tool Cursor is in talks for a new round of financing, planning to raise at least $2 billion, with a pre-money valuation of $50 billion. If this round of financing is successfully completed, Cursor's valuation will nearly double from its post-money valuation of $29.3 billion six months ago. 据 TechCrunch 报道，AI 编程工具 Cursor 正在进行新一轮融资谈判，计划募集至少 20 亿美元，融资前估值达 500 亿美元，若本轮融资顺利完成，Cursor 的估值将较六个月前的 293 亿美元融资后估值近乎翻倍。

Sources say that existing shareholders Thrive Capital and Andreessen Horowitz (a16z) are expected to co-lead this round of financing, with new investor Battery Ventures potentially participating, and strategic investor Nvidia also expected to follow suit. This round of financing is currently oversubscribed, but the final terms have not yet been finalized. 知情人士称，老股东 Thrive Capital 与 Andreessen Horowitz（a16z）预计将联合领投本轮融资，新投资方 Battery Ventures 可能参与其中，战略投资方英伟达也预计将跟投。目前该轮融资已超额认购，但最终条款尚未敲定。

item.title: 钉钉创始人称公司全员禁止写文档
item.guid: 钉钉创始人称公司全员禁止写文档
item.description:
According to Sina Tech, at the recent 2026 'China Entrepreneur' Mulan Business Conference, DingTalk founder and CEO Chen Hang stated in his speech that if there are still people in a company who write documents every day and pride themselves on it, that company is definitely a thing of the past. 据新浪科技消息，在近期的 2026《中国企业家》商界木兰年会上，钉钉创始人兼 CEO 陈航在演讲中表示，如果公司里面还有人天天写文档，以写文档自居，这个公司一定是过去式。

He mentioned that the company, with its current 1,400 to 1,500 employees, strictly prohibits writing documents. 'As long as I see a document written by a human, I will definitely criticize it. Not allowing document writing is our basic principle now; no note-taking in meetings, meeting minutes, and follow-ups are all done by AI.' 他提到，公司现在一千四五百人，严禁写文档。「只要被我看到这个文档是人写的，我肯定批评。不准写文档现在我们的基本原则，开会不准做笔记，会议纪要、后续会议跟进，全是 AI。」

Discussions are only allowed using whiteboards, drawing and writing freely on the board, because this is the most natural way for humans to communicate. After communication, a photo is taken, and that's it. The photos on the wall and the audio of the conversation are automatically analyzed and summarized by AI, turning into meeting minutes and follow-ups.

Chen Hang emphasized, 'The era of writing documents is over; the era when it was cool to write documents with Microsoft Office is also over.' 陈航强调，「没有再写文档的时代了，用 Microsoft Office 写文档很牛的时代都结束了。」

item.title: 万达电影正式更名「儒意电影」
item.guid: 万达电影正式更名「儒意电影」
item.description: According to a report by The Beijing News, the Shenzhen Stock Exchange official website announced yesterday that Wanda Film Holding Co., Ltd. has officially changed its company name to Ruyi Film Entertainment Co., Ltd. Effective April 20 this year, the company's stock abbreviation will change from 'Wanda Film' to 'Ruyi Film,' while the stock code '002739' will remain unchanged. 据新京报报道，深交所官网昨日发布公告，万达电影股份有限公司正式宣布变更公司名称为儒意电影娱乐股份有限公司。自今年 4 月 20 日起，公司证券简称由「万达电影」变更为「儒意电影」，证券代码「002739」保持不变。

item.title: 💡 Dario Amodei：AI 五年内或取代半数初级白领
item.guid: 💡-Dario-Amodei：AI-五年内或取代半数初级白领
item.description:
According to the Financial Times, Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei recently stated in an interview that AI will replace up to 50% of junior white-collar jobs within five years. He frankly said that the industry cannot avoid this impact. 据《金融时报》报道，Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 近日在接受采访时表示，AI 将在五年内取代最多 50% 的初级白领岗位。他直言，行业不能回避这一冲击。

We should not deny that disruption will happen; we just need to make the positive effects large enough to make them tools for dealing with disruption.

Amodei also pointed out that current AI technology can only 'spread at the speed of trust,' and the industry has not yet delivered on its previous optimistic promises, so trust remains scarce. Amodei 同时指出，当前 AI 技术只能「以信任的速度扩散」，而行业尚未兑现此前的乐观承诺，信任仍然稀缺。

Regarding the potential for AI development, Amodei holds a firmly optimistic attitude. 对于 AI 发展潜力，Amodei 持坚定乐观态度。

There is no end to the rainbow; the rainbow is the rainbow itself... We see no signs of slowing down.

In response, Turing Award winner and French computer scientist Yann LeCun posted on X yesterday, criticizing Amodei for being 'ignorant' about the impact of technological revolution on the labor market, and advised the public to 'listen to the opinions of economists who have dedicated their careers to studying this issue,' while also naming and recommending five authoritative scholars in the field of labor economics. 对此，图灵奖得主、法国计算机科学家 Yann LeCun 昨天在 X 发文回应，批评 Amodei 对技术革命影响劳动力市场「一无所知」，并建议公众「听听那些把职业生涯奉献给研究这一问题的经济学家的意见」，同时点名推荐了五位劳动经济学领域的权威学者。

item.title: 苹果 iPhone 18 Pro 新配色曝光：深樱桃色接棒星宇橙
item.guid: 苹果-iPhone-18-Pro-新配色曝光：深樱桃色接棒星宇橙
item.description:
According to Macworld, the color scheme for Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro series, set to be released in September this year, has been leaked in advance. 据 Macworld 报道，今年 9 月即将发布的苹果 iPhone 18 Pro 系列的配色方案已提前曝光。

A source familiar with Apple's supply chain revealed that the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max, set to debut this autumn, will feature a new 'Deep Cherry' color, replacing the widely popular 'Space Orange' of the iPhone 17 Pro series as the flagship color for the new generation Pro series. 一位熟悉苹果供应链的消息人士透露，今年秋季亮相的 iPhone 18 Pro 与 iPhone 18 Pro Max 将主打全新「深樱桃色」，以取代 iPhone 17 Pro 系列广受关注的「星宇橙」，成为新一代 Pro 系列的主打色。

    The Deep Cherry color (Pantone 6076) has a hue closer to red wine than bright red, offering an overall calm and understated look, less vibrant and eye-catching than Space Orange;

    Light blue (Pantone 2121) is relatively close to the "Misty Blue" of the iPhone 17, belonging to an elegant, low-saturation hue;

    Dark gray (Pantone 426C) is close to pure black, and the visual effect may be similar to "Space Gray";

    Silver (Pantone 427C) continues the existing design, with basically no changes.

However, sources also pointed out that these color schemes are currently still in the development stage and may be cut before mass production. 不过，消息人士同时指出，这些配色目前仍处于开发阶段，量产前均有可能被砍。

Regarding foldable models, the rumored new foldable screen product, expected to be named "iPhone Ultra," will have more conservative color options, likely only offering silver and indigo. It is reported that when unfolded, the device will resemble an iPad mini, with a body thickness of only 4.7 mm, thinner than the 5.6 mm iPhone Air. 可折叠机型方面，目前盛传将命名为「iPhone Ultra」的折叠屏新品配色选择更为保守，预计仅提供银色与深蓝色（Indigo）两款。据悉，该机展开后形态接近 iPad mini，机身厚度仅 4.7 毫米，薄于 5.6 毫米的 iPhone Air。

At the design level, CAD engineering drawings obtained by Macworld show that the iPhone 18 Pro will feature a smaller Dynamic Island, a reduced gap between the rear camera glass cutout and the module protrusion, and an overall improved sense of integration on the back of the device. 在设计层面，Macworld 获取的 CAD 工程图显示，iPhone 18 Pro 将搭载更小的灵动岛、后置摄像头玻璃切口与模组凸起之间的间隙也有所收窄，机身背面的整体感将进一步提升。

item.title: 马斯克公布 Grok 路线图：4.4 升至 1T 参数、4.5 达 1.5T，「大概五月初就能发布」
item.guid: 马斯克公布-Grok-路线图：4.4-升至-1T-参数、4.5-达-1.5T，「大概五月初就能发布」
item.description:
Yesterday, Elon Musk announced the subsequent iteration plans for the Grok series of models on X. 昨天，马斯克在 X 上公布了 Grok 系列模型的后续迭代计划。

    Grok 4.3 has received additional supplementary training;

    Grok 4.4's parameter scale will double to 1T, with training data covering up to early April this year, and is expected to be released in early May this year;

    Grok 4.5's parameter scale will be further expanded to 1.5T, aiming for delivery by the end of May this year.

The day before, he had stated that "the true 1T flagship is about 5 days away from completing its initial training," but did not provide a specific model at that time. 前一天，他曾表示「真正的 1T 旗舰距初始训练完成还剩约 5 天」，但彼时未给出具体型号。

Musk also revealed that the 1T flagship model will achieve a step-change improvement in coding capabilities, long-context processing, and overall skills, adding that the SpaceX AI model factory has officially become operational, with an improved base model expected to be produced approximately every two weeks thereafter. 马斯克同时透露，1T 旗舰模型将在编码能力、长上下文处理及综合技能上实现阶跃式提升，并称 SpaceXAI 模型工厂已正式跑通，后续预计每约两周便能产出一版经过改进的基础模型。

item.title: 19.99 万元起，奇瑞星途 EX7 上市
item.guid: 19.99-万元起，奇瑞星途-EX7-上市
item.description:
Yesterday, Chery Exeed EX7 officially launched, offering a total of 6 models with pure electric and extended-range power, with official guide prices ranging from 199,900 to 263,900 yuan. 昨天，奇瑞星途 EX7 正式上市，推出纯电与增程两种动力共 6 款车型，官方指导价为 19.99 万至 26.39 万元。

    Adopts the "Interstellar Aesthetics" design language, with body dimensions of 4988mm (length), 1975mm (width), and 1710mm (height), a wheelbase of 3000mm, a trunk volume of 1800 liters, and a front trunk of 60 liters;

    The extended-range version is equipped with a 1.5T engine and a 41.16 kWh battery pack, offering a pure electric range of 245 kilometers (CLTC), with the four-wheel-drive version having a total motor power of 374kW;

    The pure electric version is entirely based on an 800V high-voltage platform, offering two CATL battery options: 70.01 kWh and 100.26 kWh, corresponding to ranges of 600 km, 682 km, and 726 km;

    The center console features a 30-inch 6K integrated screen, with a built-in Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295P chip;

    Standardly equipped with the Falcon 700 system built on Horizon HSD, featuring a roof-mounted LiDAR and NVIDIA Orin-Y chip, supporting high-speed and urban navigation assistance.

🔗 Related Reading: Industry First! Wire-controlled braking mass-produced and installed, Chery Exeed EX7 launched with prices starting from 199,900 yuan 🔗 相关阅读： 行业首发！线控制动量产上车，奇瑞星途 EX7 上市售价 19.99 万元起

item.title: 捷达发布 JETTA X 概念车预告，明天全球首秀
item.guid: 捷达发布-JETTA-X-概念车预告，明天全球首秀
item.description:
Yesterday, FAW-Volkswagen's Jetta brand officially released a teaser video and multiple teaser images of its new concept car, JETTA X. The new car will make its global debut at the Volkswagen Group Media Night on April 21st, and then be showcased at the 2026 Beijing Auto Show, which opens on April 24th. 一汽-大众旗下捷达品牌昨天正式发布了全新概念车 JETTA X 的预告视频及多张预告图，新车将于 4 月 21 日举办的大众集团媒体之夜上迎来全球首秀，并随后亮相 4 月 24 日开幕的 2026 北京车展。

From the exposed preview images, the JETTA X concept car features an overall square and robust design; the front face adopts a sharp split-type lamp cluster design, with sharp daytime running light lines, paired with hidden main headlights and raised hood lines, eliminating the traditional fuel car's intake grille, aligning with the design language of pure electric vehicles. 从已曝光的预告图来看，JETTA X 概念车整体造型方正硬朗；前脸采用凌厉的分体式灯组设计，日行灯线条锐利，搭配隐藏式主大灯与隆起的机盖线条，取消了传统燃油车的进气格栅，契合纯电车型的设计语言。

Both front and rear lamp clusters adopt an aircraft tail wing shape, further enhancing the sense of technology and sportiness. The roof is equipped with a luggage rack, but the preview images show that the new car is not yet equipped with a sunroof. 前后灯组均采用飞机尾翼造型，进一步强化科技感与运动气息。车顶配备行李架，但预告图显示新车暂未配备天窗。

item.title: 12306：五一售票以来已拦截抢票软件出票 105.6 万张
item.guid: 12306：五一售票以来已拦截抢票软件出票-105.6-万张
item.description:
According to The Paper, China Railway 12306 Technology Center disclosed that since ticket sales for the May Day holiday began, as of 24:00 on April 18, 12306 has cumulatively rejected 1.056 million tickets issued by third-party "ticket-grabbing software" platforms. 据澎湃新闻报道，中国铁路 12306 技术中心披露，自五一假期售票开启以来，截至 4 月 18 日 24 时，12306 已累计拒绝第三方平台「抢票软件」出票 105.6 万张。

During this period, 12306 comprehensively utilized big data analysis and risk control technologies to accurately assess abnormal accounts that frequently purchase a large number of tickets for others and payment accounts that frequently make payments on behalf of others, and implemented corresponding technical restriction measures. 在此期间，12306 综合运用大数据分析与风控技术，对频繁大量为他人购票的异常账号及频繁代为支付的支付账户实施精准研判，并采取相应技术限制措施。

Specific data shows: cumulatively, login authentication was strengthened for 467,000 abnormal 12306 accounts, different control measures were taken for 2.988 million payment accounts, 5.64 million transactions were placed in a slow queue, and 704,000 transactions were directly rejected from issuing tickets, totaling 1.056 million rejected tickets. 具体数据显示：累计对 46.7 万个异常 12306 账号加强登录认证，对 298.8 万个支付账户采取不同管控措施，将 564 万笔交易放入慢速队列，70.4 万笔交易直接拒绝出票，合计拒绝出票 105.6 万张。

item.title: 航油价格飙升，「五一」航班大面积取消
item.guid: 航油价格飙升，「五一」航班大面积取消
item.description:
According to CCTV.com, as the "May Day" holiday approaches, a large number of travelers have received cancellation notices for domestic flights to Southeast Asia, involving popular destinations such as Bangkok, Phuket, and Vientiane. 据央视网报道，「五一」假期临近，大量旅客收到国内飞往东南亚航班的取消通知，涉及曼谷、普吉岛、万象等热门目的地。

Qi Qi, an expert from the China Civil Aviation High-Quality Development Research Center, pointed out that this large-scale cancellation mainly involves Southeast Asian airlines. High oil prices are the direct cause – these countries' aviation kerosene almost entirely relies on imports, and the Middle East situation has severely impacted their supply chains, leaving some airlines facing the dilemma of "no fuel to add". 中国民航高质量发展研究中心专家綦琦指出，此次大面积取消主要涉及东南亚航司。高油价是直接原因——这些国家的航空煤油几乎全部依赖进口，中东局势对其供应链造成严重冲击，部分航司面临「无油可加」的困境。

In the past few weeks, global aviation fuel prices have surged from $85-90 per barrel to $150-200, reaching a ten-year high. Olivier Jankovec, Director General of ACI Europe, warned yesterday that if the situation in the Strait of Hormuz does not improve in the short term, EU countries will also face a systemic aviation fuel shortage. 在过去几周内，全球航空燃油价格已从每桶 85 至 90 美元飙升至 150 至 200 美元，创十年新高。国际机场理事会欧洲区域总干事奥利弗·扬科韦茨昨日警告，若霍尔木兹海峡局势短期内无法改善，欧盟国家同样将面临系统性航空燃油短缺。

Experts advise travelers to prioritize large airlines when traveling, as they have richer route resources and greater flexibility for rebooking in case of flight changes; before purchasing international tickets, carefully read the terms of carriage and retain relevant evidence; when booking hotels simultaneously, try to choose products with free cancellation to reduce potential losses. 专家建议旅客出行时优先选择大型航空公司，其航线资源更为丰富，航班变动时改签灵活性更高；购买国际机票前应仔细阅读运输条款，并留存相关证据；同步预订酒店时尽量选择可免费取消的产品，以降低潜在损失。

item.title: 光明「新鲜牧场」被指擦边鲜牛奶
item.guid: 光明「新鲜牧场」被指擦边鲜牛奶
item.description:
According to China News Service, Bright Dairy's "Fresh Pasture" milk has recently received complaints from multiple consumers, who believe it misleads consumers with trademark wordplay and skirts the definition of fresh milk. 据中国新闻网报道，光明乳业旗下「新鲜牧场」牛奶近期遭多位消费者投诉，认为其以商标文字游戏误导消费者、擦边鲜牛奶。

According to national standard GB 19645-2010 'National Food Safety Standard Pasteurized Milk', only pasteurized milk can be labeled with 'Fresh Cow (Goat) Milk'. However, 'Fresh Pasture' is actually high-temperature sterilized milk, with a shelf life of up to 15 days under 2-6℃ conditions, exceeding that of pasteurized milk, and inconsistent with the national standard definition of 'fresh milk'. 根据国家标准 GB 19645-2010《食品安全国家标准巴氏杀菌乳》，只有巴氏杀菌乳才能标注「鲜牛（羊）奶」字样。但「新鲜牧场」实为高温杀菌乳，在 2~6℃条件下保质期长达 15 天，超过巴氏杀菌乳，与「鲜奶」国标定义不符。

Reporters checked the website of the Trademark Office of the China National Intellectual Property Administration and found that Bright Dairy had repeatedly applied for trademark registration for 'Fresh Pasture', but all were rejected. Currently, it is only used with a TM symbol, but the large lettering on the packaging has created a psychological suggestion for consumers that 'the product is fresh milk'. 记者查询国家知识产权局商标局网站发现，光明乳业曾多次申请「新鲜牧场」商标注册均遭驳回，目前仅以 TM 标识使用，但包装上的大字标注已对消费者形成「产品是鲜牛奶」的心理暗示。

item.title: 《穿普拉达的女王 2》发布新正片片段，4 月 30 日上映
item.guid: 《穿普拉达的女王-2》发布新正片片段，4-月-30-日上映
item.description:
According to blogger 'Watchmen Hollywood', the movie 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' recently released a new clip, showing protagonist Andy's return to Runway magazine. The film is scheduled to be released in mainland China on April 30 this year, and in North America on May 1. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，电影《穿普拉达的女王 2》近日发布新正片片段，展示了主角安迪重返《Runway》杂志社的场景，该片将于今年 4 月 30 日在中国内地上映，北美则定于 5 月 1 日公映。

In the clip, Andy's current assistant is played by actress Shen Yutian (Helen J. Shen). In a conversation with Andy, the new assistant states that she joined as an intern earlier this year and later successfully applied for the position because 'no one wanted to work in your department,' pointing out the department's situation with the phrase 'not real fashion'. 片段中，安迪的现任助理由演员沈雨田（Helen J. Shen）饰演。这位新助理在与安迪的对话中自述，曾于今年早些时候以实习生身份入职，后因「没有人想要在你的部门工作」而成功应聘上岗，并以「不是真正的时尚」一语点出部门处境。

The dialogue is brisk, and the new character's lines mention her academic background: Yale University graduate, GPA 3.86, lead soprano of the Whiffenpoofs choir, and a perfect score of 36 on her first ACT, creating a vivid image. 对话节奏轻快，新角色台词中提及其学历背景：耶鲁大学毕业、GPA 3.86、Whiffenpoofs 合唱团主音女高音、首次 ACT 满分 36 分，形象鲜明。

item.title: 《末世行者》首曝预告
item.guid: 《末世行者》首曝预告
item.description:
Ridley Scott's new film 'Canine' recently released its first trailer, with the provisional Chinese title 'Apocalyptic Walker', scheduled for North American release on August 28. 雷德利·斯科特执导的新片《大犬座》近日首曝预告片，中文片名暂定《末世行者》，计划 8 月 28 日北美上映。

The film is adapted from the eponymous post-apocalyptic novel by American author Peter Heller, with the screenplay penned by Mark L. Smith. The story is set in the near future, where an unidentified pandemic has completely devastated American society. 影片改编自美国作家彼得·海勒所著的末世题材同名小说，剧本由马克·L·史密斯操刀。故事设定在不久的将来，一场身份不明的流行病彻底摧毁了美国社会。

Hig, a pilot from Colorado, miraculously survived but lost his wife in the disaster. Since then, he has lived in seclusion in a hangar with his beloved dog and a tough former Marine, leading a life isolated from the world. 科罗拉多州的飞行员 Hig 侥幸存活，却在灾难中失去了妻子，此后与爱犬及一名强硬的前海军陆战队员蛰居于机库之中，过着与世隔绝的生活。

One day, while flying his plane, Hig unexpectedly receives a mysterious radio signal, which ignites his hope for a better life in the outside world, embarking on a journey of unknown discovery. One of the film's core conflicts is the confrontation between the survivors and scavengers known as 'Reapers'. 某日，Hig 驾机时意外收到一段神秘无线电信号，由此燃起对外部世界存有更好生活的希望，踏上了一段充满未知的寻找之旅。影片的核心冲突之一，是幸存者们与被称为「Reapers」的清道者之间的对抗。

item.title: 《使命召唤》电影官宣 2028 年夏季上映
item.guid: 《使命召唤》电影官宣-2028-年夏季上映
item.description:
Paramount Pictures recently announced at CinemaCon that the live-action film adaptation of the popular first-person shooter game series 'Call of Duty' is officially scheduled for release on June 30, 2028. 派拉蒙影业日前在 CinemaCon 上宣布，热门第一人称射击游戏系列《使命召唤》的真人改编电影正式定档 2028 年 6 月 30 日上映。

The film is directed by Peter Berg, with a screenplay co-written by Berg and Taylor Sheridan, screenwriter of "Yellowstone" and "Sicario". The film is co-developed and produced by Paramount Pictures and Activision, with Paramount responsible for distribution, and Sheridan and David Glasser serving as co-producers. 该片由彼得·博格执导，剧本由博格与《黄石》《边境杀手》编剧泰勒·谢里丹联合创作。影片由派拉蒙影业与动视联合开发制作，派拉蒙负责发行，谢里丹与 David Glasser 同任制片人。

Producer Kostich stated at the press conference that he and Berg had always hoped to find "a partner who truly cares about this IP," and they found that fit with Paramount CEO David Ellison. Berg emphasized his deep connection with the special operations community, hoping the film would present the subject matter with "authenticity" and "grand scope." 制片人 Kostich 在发布会上表示，他与博格一直希望找到「真正在乎这个 IP 的合作伙伴」，并在派拉蒙 CEO David Ellison 身上找到了这种契合。博格则强调自己与特种作战群体有深厚渊源，希望影片能以「真实感」和「宏大格局」来呈现这一题材。
